purpose: Validate runner accounting fix commit c62f3ac with exactly one LM Studio local Promptfoo cell after Stream 36 exposed Promptfoo exiting 0 with no fresh results.

commitValidation.subject: Reject promptfoo runs without result totals

runtimeBefore.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 280 MiB used, 7792 MiB free, 6% utilization

command.scopeGuard: Exactly one LM Studio local Promptfoo cell; no retry, no other model, profile, or task was run.

row.stderr: Promptfoo exited successfully but did not emit pass totals or refresh results/promptfoo-latest.json.

stream36Comparison.stream37Delta: The same quick Promptfoo exit 0/no refreshed results case is now status=eval_no_results with an explicit stale-result stderr instead of status=completed.

promptfooLatestStatus.assessment: results/promptfoo-latest.json still points to the Stream 34 31B-QAT surface and was not refreshed by Stream 37.

summaryAccounting.assessment: summarize-matrix ignored the .progress.jsonl sidecar and did not count the eval_no_results/no-pass row as completed.

runtimeAfterUnload.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 280 MiB used, 7792 MiB free, 4% utilization

closedOrSharpened: Runner accounting fix validated for the Stream 36 edge case: Promptfoo exit 0 with no fresh result totals now produces status=eval_no_results.
Progress telemetry was produced and latest progress reached run_finished.
summarize-matrix ignores .progress.jsonl and does not count no-pass rows as completed.
notClosed: No Promptfoo result surface or pass totals were produced for qwen in this cell.
Qwen full current-suite no-cache throughput remains incomplete.
Subjective user review, final 3-solid selection, broad/full matrix coverage, broad partial-profile quality/throughput, broad 31B/31B-QAT proof, and final verifier audit remain open.
